title: Polish responsive workspace shell behavior
description: Use the current responsive shell changes to improve tablet icon-rail behavior, standalone safe-area handling, and narrow chat/code rendering without touching backend APIs.

title: Add viewport screenshot smoke checks
description: Formalize the existing screenshot helper into a documented visual smoke workflow for mobile, tablet, laptop, and desktop breakpoints.

title: Add changed-line lint accounting
description: Keep cron quality gates from failing on the existing lint baseline by reporting only lint regressions introduced by the current diff.

title: Improve health-check diagnostics
description: Expose clearer JSON diagnostics for workspace health endpoint checks when reverse proxy responses are HTML or transient 502s.

title: Reconcile feature/chat-ui-improvements with main
description: Resolve the branch divergence so the verified responsive UI work can be merged cleanly instead of remaining deployment-only from the feature worktree.

title: Promote viewport screenshots into a visual smoke check
description: Turn the local screenshot helper and viewport captures into a repeatable QA script with ignored output artifacts and documented baselines.

title: Add changed-file lint gate
description: Add a script that reports focused lint results for the current diff alongside the existing repository-wide lint baseline.
